subcodes.first_line: O Hands of the Cause of God! With consummate wisdom, deliver this enclosed letter personally into the hands of the specified individual [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ایادی امرالله مکتوب جوف را بشخص معلوم در کمال حکمت یدا بید برسانید و یا
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @Hands of the Cause
